title: AI and the Job Market in 2026
summary: AWS Developers discusses job hunting strategies in 2026 as AI transforms hiring and technical roles. The content advocates that networking, personal branding, and continuous learning remain valuable, and argues that junior developers still have meaningful roles despite AI advancement.
writeup: AWS Developers examines job hunting in 2026 as AI reshapes hiring and technical roles. The video argues that networking, personal branding, and continuous learning stay valuable, and that junior developers retain meaningful roles despite AI advancement. It frames these points around concepts including the AI adoption gap and contributions to open source.
